//: Capture-only manifest for website hero screenshots that need a state the workflow video doesn't already have. DevLauncher --capture-script reads this the same way as workflow_inline.json. Frames land in assets/screenshots/workflow/ and are NOT stitched into the video (build_workflow_video.sh only reads workflow_inline.json). build_website_shots.sh runs this manifest, then crops the resulting PNG into web/assets/.
